texture.detail_rendering: Excellent, textures of linen, wood, and sauces are rendered realistically without exaggeration.

improvement_notes: 조명: 사이드 라이팅을 사용하여 입체감과 깊이를 더할 수 있음. 색감: 화이트밸런스를 중성적으로 조정하고 특정 색의 채도를 높여 신선함을 강조할 수 있음. 구도: 삼분할 법칙이나 리딩 라인을 활용하여 더 역동적인 구성을 만들 수 있음.
nano_banana_prompt: A top-down flat lay food photography of [Your Food Subject] arranged on a rustic wooden board. The board is placed on a textured beige linen tablecloth. The lighting is bright, airy, and extremely soft, creating a nearly shadowless effect, reminiscent of overcast natural light from a large window. The color palette is warm and earthy, with muted saturation. Color graded in the style of Kodak Portra 400 film, featuring lifted blacks for a slightly faded, matte look. Shot with a 50mm lens at f/8 for sharp, deep focus across the entire frame. A subtle, fine film grain is added for an organic, analog feel. --ar 4:3 --style raw --stylize 250
